mechanism: Working capital absorption increases revolver utilization and reduces EBITDA, mechanically increasing leverage ratios and pushing them through nonlinear covenant thresholds. The 6-12 month lead of working capital over income statement means leverage breach occurs before earnings show deterioration.
regime_dependence: Stronger for capital-intensive manufacturers with positive working capital cycles; weaker for asset-light/negative-working-capital firms (tech, SaaS)
